pains.summary: Solo founders waste hours manually triaging support emails instead of building
pains.verbatim: I spend my mornings answering the same support emails by hand and it is exhausting and repetitive.

pains.summary: Founders lack a cheap way to test pricing changes without breaking billing
pains.verbatim: Every time I want to test a new price I am terrified of breaking my Stripe billing.

persona: Part-time angel investor who also builds software

pains.summary: Investors struggle to track which portfolio companies need attention each week
pains.verbatim: I never know which of my portfolio companies is quietly struggling until it is too late.
